name: Fisher's Oysters
tagline: Native oysters grown in Quandamooka waters
description: Fisher's Oysters is a family-run aquaculture business growing native rock oysters, supporting reef habitat and creating pathways into aquaculture from Minjerribah, North Stradbroke Island.

hero.heading: Working oyster farms on Country
hero.subheading: Native oysters grown in Quandamooka waters

about.intro: Founded by Shaun Fisher, a proud Gorenpul man, Fisher's Oysters grows native rock oysters on Minjerribah.
about.mission: To grow native rock oysters, support reef habitat and create pathways into aquaculture for First Nations families and community.

values.title: Family Run
values.description: Building a strong operation that creates long-term opportunities across generations.

values.title: Country Connected
values.description: Growing oysters and creating work connected to Quandamooka waters.

values.title: Native Oysters
values.description: Supplying native rock oysters from working farms in Moreton Bay.

values.title: Work Pathways
values.description: Training, employment and hands-on aquaculture experience on working oyster farms.

offerings.title: Grow and Supply Oysters
offerings.description: Working oyster farms supplying native rock oysters from Quandamooka (Moreton Bay).

offerings.title: Work on Country
offerings.description: Training, employment and hands-on aquaculture experience on working oyster farms in Quandamooka waters.

quote.text: Don't start with a business plan. Start with your people.

cta.heading: Support Our Oysters, Support Our Community
cta.text: For oyster orders, farm enquiries, partnerships or work opportunities, send us a message.

contact.address: Quandamooka Country, North Stradbroke Island (Minjerribah), Moreton Bay, Queensland
